name: Automatic Collections Sync for Maropost Commerce Cloud
body: [{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"What is Automatic Collections Sync?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Merchandising Cloud’s Automatic Collections Sync capability allows merchants on selected platforms to work with their collections directly from their platform's dashboard."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"With this capability, there is no need for double-jobbing, and no need to enter the Merchandising Cloud dashboard in order to manage collections."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"🚧 Automatic Collections"}]},{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Merchandising Cloud will only be able to automatically import collections that are based on Product Categories (usually with "},{"text":"ContentType: 1","code":true},{"text":") and Brands (url must contain "},{"text":"brand/","code":true},{"text":" within it)."}]}]},{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"Who can avail of the Automatic Collections Sync feature?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Currently, Automatic Collections Sync is available to merchants using Maropost Commerce Cloud or Jetshop. Merchants using Shopify or Shopify Plus can avail of the similar Seamless Shopify Collections feature."}]},{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"How does it work?"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Merchandising Cloud’s Automatic Collections Sync for Maropost Commerce Cloud capability will automatically update any changes made to a collection within the Maropost Commerce Cloud dashboard. This is done with an automated sync which occurs twice a day - without the merchant needing to do anything extra."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Should a merchant need the sync to occur immediately after a change has been made, they also have the option to manually start a sync within the Merchandising Cloud dashboard - which is as simple as pushing a button."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The capability to set up or configure individual collections will of course remain, which can be utilized for collections that require a wider set of options to set up."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"👍 Importing a Collection","bold":true}]},{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Depending on the platform, Merchandising Cloud enables merchants to import pre-existing collections from their ecommerce platform, converting the into a Smart Collection in the process. "}]},{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"This is currently available for merchants using the Shopify, Maropost Commerce Cloud, or Jetshop platforms."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
